blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 20 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,337 ft. Looking ahead, 63 inches possible over the next 14 days.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 31".
